title: antirrhinum graniticum subsp. boissieri
intro: Antirrhinum graniticum subsp. boissieri, also known as the Boissier's snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Antirrhinum graniticum subsp. boissieri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
